_comment: Act 4 / Challenge 4.2 — Realign the Agent (NPC/AI finale). Loaded at /spiffs/challenge_4_2.json.
_timing_note: 10-minute session window for the full reveal + conversation arc.
_required_note: Beacon pre-checks these before advertising the challenge; badge also checks locally.

reveal._note: Each fragment line is displayed for 4s before the next. Total reveal: ~20s.

conversation._note: 45s per turn before auto-timeout. Max 10 turns before session expires.

custom._prompt_assembly_note: Beacon drives a line-by-line reveal on the e-paper, 1 fragment line at a time.

sim._note: Software simulator config for full end-to-end testing without hardware.
sim._auto_grant_note: Set true in dev to bypass credential gates; false for realistic sim.
sim._mock_ai_note: Set true to use canned DEEPDISH replies instead of hitting Claude API; needs STT_PROVIDER=mock too.
